info.english_meaning: to fill to be satisfied to be content

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'paprATa kzAM mahi daMso vyurvIm' (f0 6177) vi paprATa viSezeRa pUritavAnasi
'A prA dyAvApfTivI antarikzam' (f0 11151) AprAH=aprAt pUritavAn vyApnot vyASnuta
'ApaprO pArTivaM rajo badvaDe rocanA divi' (f0 1815) ukto'rTaH
